eval-criteria-1.content:
Detect cross-artifact propagation gaps from recent resolutions:
1. Read `resolved.md` for resolved gaps with Outcome fields
2. For each resolution that added/modified a requirement scenario:
   a. Check if infra.md coverage table has a corresponding verification entry
   b. Check if tasks.yaml behavioral-verification checklists include the scenario
3. For each resolution that added a new Rule:
   a. Check if infra.md has a coverage row for the new Rule
   b. Check if tasks.yaml behavioral-verification has a checklist item for the Rule
4. If complete: []
5. For each: {"id": <next_gap_id>, "change": "new", "title": "short title", "description": "Resolution of GAP-XX added <what> but <artifact> was not updated"}
6. Source: propagation-detection
